infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Verifying that --headed or AGENT_BROWSER_HEADED=1 actually opens a visible browser window requires a display server and visual inspection. No artifact the agent can produce (beyond including the flag in a script) would let a grader confirm headed mode was genuinely used. Partially covered by script review in other scenarios.

Testing that the agent correctly chooses --annotate for icon-only / canvas elements requires a live page with those specific element types. The eval sandbox has no running app with canvas or unlabeled icon buttons to trigger this decision.

Verifying agent-browser dashboard start/stop behaviour and confirming the dashboard is accessible at :4848 requires a running daemon and a separate browser to check the dashboard UI. Neither is available in the file-based eval sandbox.
